response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience, strong TypeScript/Python skills, and direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows). However, his resume lacks explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent frameworks, or cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) experience beyond general cloud infrastructure. His AI work is more aligned with developer tooling than production-grade GenAI systems. The mismatch between his broad skillset and the GenAI-specific requirements reduces his overall fit.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript and Python
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven ability to lead technical projects, mentor teams, and deliver production-grade software
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Limited visible experience with major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) for AI workloads
Resume emphasizes general software engineering over GenAI-specific technical leadership

key_factors.factor: GenAI-specific technical requirements (vector DBs, RAG, multi-agent)
Cloud platform experience for AI workloads
